statement: In every magma, Equation 892 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (x * w))`) implies Equation 1818 (`x = (y * z) * ((w * z) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0949
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op x w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op w z) z))
